---
title: "The Physics of Play"
description: "Aerodynamics in Summer Sports & FIFA World Cup 2026"
---

<div class="hero">
<h1>The Physics of <span class="highlight">Play</span></h1>
<p>How fluid dynamics, continuum mechanics, and transport phenomena shape the world's most popular sport — from the curl of a free kick to the geometry of a defensive block.</p>
</div>

## Project Overview

Four simulation modules spanning CFD to continuum mechanics, built with [ΦFlow](https://github.com/tum-pbs/PhiFlow) (JAX backend) and matplotlib.

::: {.card-grid}
::: {.card}
<span class="tag cfd">Navier-Stokes</span>

### Shot Aerodynamics

Magnus effect vs knuckleball — rotating cylinder in crossflow at $Re \approx 4 \times 10^4$. Pressure asymmetry, wake deflection, and drag.

[Explore &rarr;](shot.qmd){.arrow}
:::

::: {.card}
<span class="tag cfd">Bluff Body Flow</span>

### Tactical Positioning

Players as rectangular bluff bodies in a 10 m/s crossflow. Wake shielding, drafting, and 26.1% drag reduction in overlapping runs.

[Explore &rarr;](#){.arrow}
:::

::: {.card}
<span class="tag cont">Continuum Mechanics</span>

### Stress Fields

7v7 tactical pressure as a two-phase fluid interface. Zero-stress contour = equilibrium boundary; yield points = defensive breaches.

[Explore &rarr;](#){.arrow}
:::

::: {.card}
<span class="tag heat">Porous Media</span>

### Team Heatmaps

11v11 defensive influence as Darcy permeability. Passing lanes = low-influence contours. Collapse animation shows flow choking.

[Explore &rarr;](#){.arrow}
:::
:::

## By the Numbers

Key parameters across all simulations.

::: {.stats}
::: {.stat}
<div class="num">4</div>
<div class="lbl">Simulation modules</div>
:::

::: {.stat}
<div class="num">336×218</div>
<div class="lbl">Max grid resolution</div>
:::

::: {.stat}
<div class="num">26.1%</div>
<div class="lbl">Drag reduction (tandem)</div>
:::

::: {.stat}
<div class="num">46%→7%</div>
<div class="lbl">Permeability drop</div>
:::

::: {.stat}
<div class="num">60</div>
<div class="lbl">Frames per run</div>
:::
:::

## Technical Approach

Two distinct modelling paradigms.

::: {.card-grid}
::: {.card}
### CFD (ΦFlow / JAX)

Incompressible Navier-Stokes on a staggered grid. Semi-Lagrangian advection, iterative CG pressure solve.
:::

::: {.card}
### Gaussian Influence Fields

Players as anisotropic Gaussian distributions with velocity-dependent stretching. Superposition yields a continuous scalar field.
:::

::: {.card}
### Darcy Permeability

Fraction of defensive half where influence is below threshold. Direct analogy to porous media flow.
:::

::: {.card}
### Von Mises Yield

Local maxima in the stress field exceeding a threshold mark structural breaches in the defensive block.
:::
:::

## Explore in Depth

::: {.nav-links}
[Background Theory &rarr;](theory.qmd)
[Shot Aerodynamics &rarr;](shot.qmd)
[Tactical Positioning &rarr;](#)
[Tactical Stress Fields &rarr;](#)
[Team Heatmaps &rarr;](#)
:::
